				.HS A0A2A4A6.A8AAACAE.B0B2B4B6.B8BABCBE
				.HS C0C2C4C6.C8CACCCE.D0D2D4D6.D8DADCDE
				.HS E0E2E4E6.E8EAECEE.F0F2F4F6.F8FAFCFE
				.HS 00020406.080A0C0E.10121416.181A1C1E
				.HS 20222426.282A2C2E.30323436.383A3C3E
				.HS 40424446.484A4C4E.50525456.585A5C5E
				.HS 60626466.686A6C6E.70727476.787A7C7E
				.HS 80828486.888A8C8E.90929496.989A9C9E
				.HS A0A2A4A6.A8AAACAE.B0B2B4B6.B8BABCBE
				.HS C0C2C4C6.C8CACCCE.D0D2D4D6.D8DADCDE
				.HS E0E2E4E6.E8EAECEE.F0F2F4F6.F8FAFCFE

hTable          ; Bytes reversed for Little-Endian
                .HS 67e6096a  ; H0
                .HS 85ae67bb  ; H1
                .HS 72f36e3c  ; H2
                .HS 3af54fa5  ; H3
                .HS 7f520e51  ; H4
                .HS 8c68059b  ; H5
                .HS abd9831f  ; H6
                .HS 19cde05b  ; H7

MAN
SAVE usr/src/lib/libcrypto.s.tbl
LOAD usr/src/lib/libcrypto.s
ASM
